mapper.select: SELECT af.id, af.app_code, af.api_code, af.field_code, af.field_name, af.json_path, af.action, af.mask_rule, af.description, af.sort, af.create_time, af.create_by, af.update_time, af.update_by, af.remark, af.version, a.api_method, a.api_uri, a.api_name FROM iam_api_field af LEFT JOIN iam_api a ON a.api_code = af.api_code AND a.deleted = 0 WHERE af.deleted = 0 AND af.app_code = #{appCode} AND af.api_code = #{apiCode} AND af.field_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fieldName}, '%') ORDER BY af.id ASC
